name: RedPajama-INCITE-7B-Instruct
note: Instruction-tuned 7B; highest-scoring open 7B on HELM at launch (0.492 vs LLaMA-7B's 0.472).

results.notes: LM-eval-harness acc_norm, Table 9 of the official RedPajama technical paper (Together AI et al., NeurIPS 2024 D&B track).
LM-eval-harness acc_norm, Table 9. (A separate HELM-classic EM-metric HellaSwag score of 69.8 also appears in Table 8; using the acc_norm figure for consistency with the rest of the corpus.)

HELM-classic EM metric, Table 8 of the official RedPajama technical paper (Together AI et al., NeurIPS 2024 D&B track) — the same table already used in the file for this model's openbookqa (48.8) and truthfulqa (22.6) entries, just a different row (MMLU) that wasn't yet pulled in. Cross-checked against an independent hand-averaged 5-shot MMLU score of ~37.6% computed from the 57 hendrycksTest subject-level scores in the HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 run for this exact model (results_2023-07-19T16-41-06.835084.json) — the two values agree closely, corroborating the figure. No mmlu result currently exists in the file for this model (only the Chat sibling has one).

HF Open LLM Leaderboard (v1) supplemental run (added winogrande/gsm8k/drop) for the exact togethercomputer/RedPajama-INCITE-7B-Instruct checkpoint: harness|gsm8k|5 acc = 0.01592 (1.59%). No gsm8k result currently exists for this model in the file.

Same HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 supplemental run: harness|drop|3 F1 = 0.04209 (4.21%); EM = 0.12% is the alternate metric in the same record. F1 is the metric the leaderboard displayed publicly for DROP. Note: HF later found and disclosed an implementation bug in this leaderboard's DROP task that produced artificially depressed scores for many models circa this era — still the genuine, verifiable recorded value for this exact checkpoint. No drop result currently exists for this model.

verificationNotes: Confirmed via together.ai/blog/redpajama-7b (June 6, 2023): text states Instruct model 'outperforms LLaMA-7B and state-of-the-art open models such as Falcon-7B (Base and Instruct) and MPT-7B (Base and Instruct) on HELM by 2-9 points' and 'appears to be the best open instruct model at this scale.' Fetched arxiv.org/html/2411.12372 Table 8 directly and confirmed exact score 0.492 for RedPajama-INCITE-7B-Instruct verbatim.
